mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_report (reporter_id, post_id, reason, detail, status) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{postId}, #{reason}, #{detail}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE community_post SET report_count = report_count + 1 WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_report (reporter_id, comment_id, reason, detail, status) VALUES (#{reporterId}, #{commentId}, #{reason}, #{detail}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE community_comment SET report_count = report_count + 1 WHERE id = #{commentId}
